outbound.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-compound-enabled", "false") == "true")">
                
                <set-variable name="compoundMeasurements" value="@{
                    try {
                        var body = context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                        if (body == null) return "[]";

                        var pathsJson = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-compound-extraction-paths", "{}");
                        var dimsJson = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-compound-dimension-paths", "{}");
                        var paths = JObject.Parse(pathsJson);
                        var dims = JObject.Parse(dimsJson);

                        var measurements = new JArray();
                        foreach (var kv in paths) {
                            var token = body.SelectToken(kv.Key);
                            if (token != null && token.Type == JTokenType.Integer || token.Type == JTokenType.Float) {
                                var val = (double)token;
                                if (val > 0) {
                                    var m = new JObject();
                                    m["metricName"] = kv.Value.ToString();
                                    m["quantity"] = val;
                                    // Extract dimension if configured
                                    foreach (var dk in dims) {
                                        var dimToken = body.SelectToken(dk.Key);
                                        if (dimToken != null && dimToken.Type == JTokenType.String) {
                                            m["dimensionKey"] = dimToken.ToString();
                                            break;
                                        }
                                    }
                                    measurements.Add(m);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        return measurements.ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None);
                    } catch (Exception ex) {
                        return "[]";
                    }
                }" />

                
                
                    <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("compoundMeasurements", "[]") != "[]")">
                        
                            @($"{context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-ingestor-url")}/api/v1/ingest/compound")
                            POST
                            
                                application/json
                            
                            
                                @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-tenant-id"))
                            
                            
                                @($"Bearer {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("aforo-api-key")}")
                            
                            @{
                                var measurements = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("compoundMeasurements");
                                var evt = new JObject();
                                evt["correlationId"] = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();
                                evt["customerId"] = context.Subscription?.Key ?? context.User?.Id ?? "";
                                evt["occurredAt"] = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o");
                                evt["measurements"] = JArray.Parse(measurements);
                                evt["metadata"] = new JObject {
                                    ["gateway"] = "azure-apim",
                                    ["apiId"] = context.Api.Id,
                                    ["operationId"] = context.Operation.Id,
                                    ["statusCode"] = context.Response.StatusCode.ToString()
                                };
                                return evt.ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None);
                            }
